g.title: pwiz_module_detail
g.text: one node per .cpp/.hpp pair (test fixtures omitted); each group is its own row, top-to-bottom

a.xlink:title: MS2 isotope-cluster deisotoper. Ported as Analysis/PeakFilters/Ms2Deisotoper.cs.
MS2 noise-floor trimmer. Ported as Analysis/PeakFilters/Ms2NoiseFilter.cs.
MS1 feature (peakel) detector. NOT PORTED — research module.
Apply a constant m/z shift. Ported as Analysis/SpectrumListMzShift.cs.
ETD precursor / charge-reduced / neutral-loss removal. Ported as Analysis/PeakFilters/EtdPrecursorMassFilter.cs.
Helper for SpectrumList_PrecursorRecalculator. NOT PORTED.
Default precursor-recalc impl. NOT PORTED.
Filter-spec parser + dispatcher ("peakPicking true 1-", "msLevel 1-2", etc.). Ported as Analysis/SpectrumListFactory.cs with the full msconvert filter grammar.
3D (m/z, drift-time, intensity) reshaper. WON'T PORT — niche, not on the pwiz-sharp roadmap.

Turbocharger — isotope-pattern precursor-charge predictor. Ported as Analysis/SpectrumList_ChargeFromIsotope.cs with cpp-bit-exact MsvcRand for pre-simulated distributions + LRU parent-spectrum cache.
Heuristic precursor-charge predictor (single-vs-multi, MS1-window based). Ported as Analysis/SpectrumList_ChargeStateCalculator.cs.
DIA/MSX demultiplexer wrapper. Ported as Analysis/SpectrumListDemux.cs.

DIA-Umpire MS2 deconvolution wrapper. Ported as Analysis/DiaUmpire/SpectrumList_DiaUmpire.cs. The full DIA-Umpire algorithm (PeakCluster + PeakCurve + IsotopePatternMap + Config + DiaWindow + DiaUmpireMath + ScanData + InstrumentParameter) lives alongside it under Analysis/DiaUmpire/.
Generic index/scanTime/msLevel/polarity/scanNumber/id predicate filter. Ported as Analysis/SpectrumListFilter.cs.

Unified IM/CCS wrapper across vendors + mzML re-read. Ported as Analysis/SpectrumList_IonMobility.cs. Dispatches through MsData/IIonMobilitySpectrumList (units + combined-IM + SONAR flag) and MsData/IIonMobilityCcsConversion (CCS dispatch), with an mzML CV-param sniff fallback. Waters implements both interfaces today; Agilent / Bruker / Mobilion / Thermo / UIMF plumb in via the same interfaces as their workflows land — the wrapper transparently uses the mzML sniff path until they do.
Lock-mass m/z correction (Waters Q-TOF use case). Ported as Analysis/SpectrumList_LockmassRefiner.cs.

External-search-result-driven m/z recalibration (mzRefiner filter). Ported as Analysis/SpectrumList_MZRefiner.cs with full cpp parity (7+ stat passes, polynomial / shift-only / global / per-scan refinement modes).
m/z range window filter. Ported as Analysis/SpectrumListMzWindow.cs.
Re-derive BPI / TIC / scanWindow from peaks. Ported as Analysis/SpectrumListMetadataFixer.cs.
Framework for per-spectrum peak filters (ETD precursor / charge-reduced / neutral-loss). Ported as Analysis/PeakFilters/.
Vendor + CWT + local-maximum centroider. Ported as Analysis/SpectrumList_PeakPicker.cs + Analysis/PeakPicking/CwtPeakDetector.cs.
Re-derive precursor m/z from MS1 (older approach than PrecursorRefine). NOT PORTED — superseded.
Re-derive precursor m/z from peak-fitted MS1. Ported as Analysis/SpectrumList_PrecursorRefine.cs.
Sum adjacent scans by retention time. Ported as Analysis/SpectrumListScanSummer.cs.
Savitzky-Golay smoother. Ported as Analysis/SpectrumList_Smoother.cs.
Re-sort spectra by scanTime / scanNumber / ID. Ported as Analysis/SpectrumListSorter.cs.
TPP-compatible spectrum-title templater. Ported as Analysis/SpectrumListTitleMaker.cs.
Insert / remove zero-intensity samples around profile peaks. Ported as Analysis/SpectrumListZeroSamplesFilter.cs.
Per-spectrum intensity thresholder (count / count-after-ties / absolute / bpi-relative / tic-relative / tic-cutoff). Ported as Analysis/ThresholdFilter.cs.
Peakel-based feature detector. NOT PORTED.
Cubic Hermite interpolation. NOT PORTED — no current consumer in the demux path.
Greedy feature detector. NOT PORTED.
Gaussian-mixture model fitter for features. NOT PORTED.
(m/z, rt) coordinate type. NOT PORTED.
Noise estimation utilities. NOT PORTED.
Extract peaks above a noise floor (feature-detector helper). NOT PORTED.
Charge-state-aware peak family grouping. NOT PORTED.
FT-MS-specific peak family detector. NOT PORTED.

IPeakDetector + CwtPeakDetector + LocalMaximumPeakDetector. Ported as Analysis/PeakPicking/IPeakDetector.cs + CwtPeakDetector.cs + LocalMaximumPeakDetector.cs. Reference test fixtures (CwtPeakDetectorReferenceTests) run cpp-generated peak data through the C# port for parity.
Per-peak Gaussian/parabola fit. NOT PORTED — only feature-detector consumers use it.
Time-extension of MS1 peaks across scans. NOT PORTED.
Peakel selection from candidate set. NOT PORTED.
CLI driver. SKIPPED.
String constants for DataProcessing entries. Ported inline into DemuxHelpers.cs.
Ported. No per-file detail recorded yet.
Debug snapshot reader. SKIPPED.
Debug snapshot writer. SKIPPED.
Helper functions for demux scoring/sorting. Ported as Analysis/Demux/DemuxHelpers.cs.

Non-negative least-squares (NNLS) solver for DIA demultiplexing. Ported as Analysis/Demux/DemuxSolver.cs + Nnls.cs (~200 LOC; cpp-bit-equivalent active-set solver). Optimized with span-based memory access for 4-8x speedup vs naïve port.
Common demux types (DemuxWindow, DemuxIsolationWindow). Folded into Analysis/Demux/PrecursorMaskCodec.cs.
Trivial exception type. SKIPPED.
Filesystem-backed demux debug mode. SKIPPED.
IDemultiplexer interface. Ported as Analysis/Demux/IDemultiplexer.cs.
Generic interpolator interface. NOT PORTED.
Header-only interface. Subsumed by PrecursorMaskCodec.cs.
MSX demultiplexer (Thermo MS2 multiplexing). Ported as Analysis/Demux/MsxDemultiplexer.cs.
Eigen matrix I/O for debug snapshots. SKIPPED.
Overlapping-window DIA demultiplexer. Ported as Analysis/Demux/OverlapDemultiplexer.cs.
Precursor-window indexing codec. Ported as Analysis/Demux/PrecursorMaskCodec.cs.
Per-scan peak extractor for demux input. Ported as Analysis/Demux/SpectrumPeakExtractor.cs.
Ported. No per-file detail recorded yet.
Not yet ported. No specific reason recorded.
Ported. No per-file detail recorded yet.
Partially ported. No per-file detail recorded yet.
Ported. No per-file detail recorded yet.
Won't port. No specific replacement recorded.
Ported. No per-file detail recorded yet.
Not yet ported. No specific reason recorded.

Top-level DIA-Umpire orchestrator: builds isotope pattern maps from MS1, groups MS2 fragments into peak clusters, emits pseudo-MS/MS spectra. Ported as Analysis/DiaUmpire/DiaUmpire.cs + SpectrumList_DiaUmpire.cs.
Not yet ported. No specific reason recorded.
Not yet ported. No specific reason recorded.
Not yet ported. No specific reason recorded.
Not yet ported. No specific reason recorded.
Not yet ported. No specific reason recorded.
Not yet ported. No specific reason recorded.

Not yet ported. No specific reason recorded.
Not yet ported. No specific reason recorded.
Not yet ported. No specific reason recorded.
Not yet ported. No specific reason recorded.
Not yet ported. No specific reason recorded.
Numeric helpers (Gaussian smoothing, derivative, integration) used by the peak-detection passes. Ported as Analysis/DiaUmpire/DiaUmpireMath.cs.
Not yet ported. No specific reason recorded.
Mass-accuracy / resolution tuning parameters consumed by the clusterer. Ported as Analysis/DiaUmpire/InstrumentParameter.cs.
Per-charge averagine isotope-pattern lookup table. Ported as Analysis/DiaUmpire/IsotopePatternMap.cs.
Grouped peak curves that form one feature (matched MS1 + co-eluting MS2). Ported as Analysis/DiaUmpire/PeakCluster.cs.
Single-m/z chromatographic peak across consecutive scans — the unit DIA-Umpire clusters. Ported as Analysis/DiaUmpire/PeakCurve.cs.
Per-scan working buffers (mz/intensity arrays, RT, MS level). Ported as Analysis/DiaUmpire/ScanData.cs.
Not yet ported. No specific reason recorded.

Command-string dispatcher for stacking ProteinList wrappers: `index <int-set>`, `id <file-or-semicolon-list>`, `decoyGenerator <reverse|shuffle[=seed]> <prefix>`. Ported as Analysis/Proteome/ProteinListFactory.cs.
Not yet ported. No specific reason recorded.
Not yet ported. No specific reason recorded.

Doubles a ProteinList by generating decoy proteins (reversed or shuffled sequence) for every target. Find(id) strips the decoy prefix on lookup. Ported as Analysis/Proteome/ProteinList_DecoyGenerator.cs.
Won't port. No specific replacement recorded.

Predicate-driven sub-list over a ProteinList; supports IndexSet, IdSet, and arbitrary client predicates. Tribool return type lets predicates request sequence-loading via a retry pass. Ported as Analysis/Proteome/ProteinList_Filter.cs.
Not yet ported. No specific reason recorded.
Not yet ported. No specific reason recorded.
Continuous-wavelet-transform peak detector. Ported as Analysis/PeakPicking/CwtPeakDetector.cs.
Not yet ported. No specific reason recorded.
Not yet ported. No specific reason recorded.

Abstract interface for SpectrumDataFilter + ChromatogramDataFilter. Ported as Analysis/PeakFilters/ISpectrumDataFilter.cs.
Drops / preserves flanking zero samples around peaks (preserveFlankingZeros toggle). Folded inline into Analysis/SpectrumListZeroSamplesFilter.cs.
Simple local-maximum peak detector. Ported as Analysis/PeakPicking/LocalMaximumPeakDetector.cs.
Abstract interface + Peak struct for peak detectors. Ported as Analysis/PeakPicking/IPeakDetector.cs.
Savitzky-Golay polynomial smoothing. Ported as Analysis/PeakPicking/SavitzkyGolaySmoother.cs (and ChromatogramListSavitzkyGolaySmoother for the chromatogram path).
Abstract interface for 1-D smoothers. Ported as Analysis/PeakPicking/ISmoother.cs.

Whittaker smoothing. NOT PORTED — SeeMS exposes it as a Smoother.Type enum value but the implementation isn't wired through. msconvert defaults to SG so this rarely matters; port when a user asks for it.
Inserts zero-intensity samples between m/z gaps so downstream filters see a uniformly-sampled signal. Ported as Analysis/PeakPicking/ZeroSampleFiller.cs.
